creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left shows long truck convoy/warehouse maze, right shows simple farm-to-hub direct line with fresh product.
primary_text:
If supermarket beef travels 2,400km through multiple warehouses, how much freshness survives? Our regenerative beef goes farm to hub in days, not weeks. Zero wholesalers, zero long-haul transport, zero compromise on quality. Paddock to pick-up from your nearest hub.

No middlemen. No commitment. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.
headline: If your beef travelled 2,400km first
description: Farm-direct regenerative groceries. Days old, not weeks. Collect from Brookvale hub or get Sydney delivery.
